first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the textual differences between the two evaluations are minor rephrasings and slight shifts in focus that fall within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise. The core reasoning remains consistent: the candidate has strong geospatial experience but lacks the specific C++/Rust and distributed systems skills required. Crucially, none of the changes in the variant evaluation's text can be attributed to the change in location from Berlin to San Francisco.
